---
pagetitle: "opal — the open population assessment library"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
format:
  html:
    toc: true

listing:
  - id: resource-listing
    type: grid
    max-items: 8
    page-size: 6
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, description]
    contents:
        # TODO: point these at the rendered case-study / paper HTML once they are
        # copied into assets/ (or convert them to in-project .qmd pages).
        - path: assets/opal-sc22-wp.html
          title: "SC22 working paper"
          description: >
            WCPFC Scientific Committee working paper describing opal's architecture and the two case studies.
          display-order: 1
    sort: "display-order"

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/customizations/hero.css">
resources:
  - assets/customizations/hero.css
  - assets/images/
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-hero mb-5">
  <div class="site-intro">
    <h1 class="site-title text-primary mt-0 fw-lighter text-center text-sm-start">
      opal
    </h1>

    <div class="species-info">
      <h2 class="site-subtitle text-secondary mt-0 fw-lighter text-center text-sm-start">
        the open population assessment library
      </h2>
    </div>

    <p class="site-intro fs-5">
      <strong>opal</strong> is an open-source, modular R package for fisheries stock assessment,
      built on <a href="https://github.com/kaskr/RTMB">RTMB</a> for automatic differentiation and
      gradient-based optimization. It is developed under
      <strong>WCPFC <a href="https://www.wcpfc.int/">Project 123</a></strong>: scoping the next
      generation of tuna stock assessment software.
    </p>

    <div class="cta-buttons">
      <a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://n-ducharmebarth-noaa.github.io/opal/">Documentation</a>
      <a class="btn btn-outline-secondary" href="https://github.com/N-DucharmeBarth-NOAA/opal">View on GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="site-logo">
    <div class="logo-container">
      <!-- TODO: add assets/images/opal-hex.png -->
      <img src="assets/static/opal-HEX-transparent.png" alt="opal hex logo" class="noaa-logo">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-note}
## Development status
opal is under active development (proof of concept, version 0.0.3). The case studies presented here are illustrative and are **not** intended to inform management advice.
:::

## Quick links {#resources}

::: {#resource-listing}
:::

## External resources

- [opal package documentation](https://n-ducharmebarth-noaa.github.io/opal/)
- [opal on GitHub](https://github.com/N-DucharmeBarth-NOAA/opal)
- [RTMB](https://github.com/kaskr/RTMB) --- the automatic-differentiation engine opal is built on
- [WCPFC](https://www.wcpfc.int/) --- Western and Central Pacific Fisheries Commission

## Contact

For questions about opal, open an issue <https://github.com/N-DucharmeBarth-NOAA/opal/issues>.
